value:
Hello, thanks for reaching out. I understand how frustrating it is when your devices aren't connecting the way you'd expect. The issue you're describing—where your phone can't recognize your AppleTV as a remote because it's on wired ethernet rather than WiFi—is a common connectivity limitation, as Apple's remote pairing typically requires both devices to be on the same network (usually WiFi).

Here are a couple of options to try: you could connect your AppleTV to WiFi in addition to or instead of the wired connection, which would let your phone discover it as a remote. Alternatively, some AppleTV models allow you to use your iPhone's Control Center to access AirPlay and HomeKit controls even without the dedicated Remote app. 

If you'd like to explore these solutions further or if you're running into other issues, please let me know your AppleTV model and iOS version, and we can work through this together.
